title: とっておきのお友だち？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm about to have lunch, I suddenly hear a very
loud voice.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: No, I don't wannaaa! Nuh-uh, nuh-uh! I won't eat my veggies, and you can't make me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... How should I deal with this naughty
witch?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I've noticed that you never eat your vegetables,
whether here or at the dorms... As your dorm
leader, I worry that you're not getting enough
vitamins and minerals.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Green bell peppers and onions are the
sworn enemy of all witches! I don't care what you
say, I'm not eating them!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sworn enemies, you say? Why yes, I think I've
read a book on this matter before.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Its passages spoke of how witches are familiar
with all manner of plants, including flowers and
vegetables.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sounds to me like a great witch would be in good
tidings with green bell peppers and onions, don't
you think?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, uh...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Why, this could be an opportunity for you. Surely
acquainting yourself with these veggies will bring
you one step closer to becoming a great witch.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: W-well... Urrrgh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho's eyes dart around in search of help,
eventually locking with mine.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's it! Hey, you! You tell me what I should do!
choice_data_list: I think you should eat your vegetables.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wh-why would you say thaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. Let us begin with the green bell
peppers. "Fair witch, will you be my friend?"

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh, I'll do it, okay?! Just so... I can become a
great witch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Gulp.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Blergh! It's sooo bitter! I knew I shouldn't have
eaten it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Vegetables are supposed to be used for magical
potions and stuff! Why would a witch need to be
friends with them? That doesn't make sense!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yuck, yuck, yuck! I can't get the taste out of my
mouuuuth! WAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I guess this is where the real battle
begins.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'll bring you some juice, so please... quiet down.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, good choice! You know exactly what to
say! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I've made up my mind—no veggies for Sweepy!
Why be friends with them when I can have my way
with magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Here's what I'll do with them...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'll do this! And even this!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ah... Stop that!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wah?! Where'd these... v-vegetables come from?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe! That solves everything! ♪ See ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho makes a run for it after pushing her
vegetables onto Kawakami Princess's plate.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki and Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Come back this instant! Hey, get back here!
